description:
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.


See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- Fixed autocompletion when using multiple databases by @thomaswasle in #115
- Feat/support more pg types v3 by @dev-void-7 in #114
New Contributors
- @thomaswasle made their first contribution in #115
Full Changelog: v0.9.13...v0.9.14
